subcodes.first_line: The Mother Book hath appeared and summoned all unto the Mighty, the All-Bountiful. O concourse of the earth! Hearken unto the Call of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر ام الکتاب و دعا الکل الی العزیز الوهاب یا ملا ارض اسمعوا ندآء الله مالک
subcodes.subjects: @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @knowledge; recognition of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
